summary: Completed full frontend E2E testing of SEO Jalwa Admin Panel. All 12 pages (Login, Dashboard, Users, User Profile, Pricing, Billing, Coupons, Blog, Announcements, Analytics, API Keys, Settings) load and function correctly. Auth (login success/error), sidebar navigation, charts (Recharts), forms, toast notifications, and localStorage persistence all work as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx uses a simulated skeleton loader (setTimeout) which briefly shows skeletons for 1-2s on every navigation to dashboard. Since data is static dummy data, this artificial delay is unnecessary UX overhead.
Coupons page uses an inline form (not a modal) for create. This works fine but is inconsistent with typical admin UX expectations (modals for create/edit).
No data-testid on table rows in Users page (only on View buttons); fine but adding row-level testids would help future test stability.
AdminContext stores auth flag in localStorage under key 'seo_jalwa_admin' - works correctly. Persistence verified on reload.
test_credentials: Admin login: username=jalwa, password=jalwaadmin (hardcoded frontend-only auth)
seed_data_creation: None - all data is static dummy data in /app/frontend/src/admin/data/dummyData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin panel pages tested and working. Login uses jalwa/jalwaadmin. Auth persisted via localStorage key 'seo_jalwa_admin'. Recharts SVGs render (31 SVGs on Analytics page). Sidebar testids: sidebar-nav-{dashboard|users|pricing|billing|coupons|blog|announcements|analytics|api-keys|settings}. User profile route: /adminpanel/users/{id}. Settings save shows toast (sonner). No backend exists - 100% frontend.
verified_flows: Login with wrong creds shows error 'Invalid username or password'
Dashboard renders metrics (Total Users 2847, Paid Users 1203, MRR $38,492, Churn 2.3%), User Signups line chart, Recent Activity feed, and plan distribution cards
Users list renders 30 rows with View buttons; clicking View navigates to /adminpanel/users/{id}
User Profile shows Overview, Usage, Billing, Activity Log tabs with user data
Pricing renders 3 editable plan cards (Starter $79, Growth $199, Agency $499) with feature toggles and Save changes button
Coupons page renders; Create coupon toggles inline form
Blog, Announcements (with Preview), API Keys all render correctly
Settings has 3 Save buttons; clicking Save shows toast notification
localStorage persists auth across page reloads (stays logged in)
Logout returns user to login screen
